# Source Map

This appendix maps existing local `inference-journal` material into the book.

## Local Source Corpus

The local journal at `/Users/ozgurguler/Developer/Projects/inference-journal`
contains raw daily logs, topic notes, benchmarks, and a prior mdBook outline.

## Mapped Topics

| Journal source | Book destination |
| --- | --- |
| `days/day-002-GPU-node-bring-up` | CPU-GPU node architecture, configurable hardware surfaces |
| `days/day-003-vLLM-capacity-and-OOM` | vLLM, benchmarking, capacity planning |
| `days/day-004-quantization-vs-bf16` | Quantization and numerics |
| `days/day-005-OS-and-NUMA-node-hardening` | CPU-GPU node architecture, hardware configuration |
| `days/day-006-slm-memory` | Memory behavior, KV cache, small model probes |
| `days/day-007-vllm-runtime-probes` | vLLM, TTFT, prefix caching, batching |
| `days/day-008-groq-dc-dimensioning` | Data center design, specialized systems, Groq comparison |
| `days/day-009-latency-metrics-and-slo-lab` | Metrics, SLOs, benchmarking harness |
| `days/day-010-attention-architecture-gqa-mqa` | Attention and KV cache |
| `days/day-011-runtime-shootout` | Runtime map and serving engine comparisons |
| `days/day-012-long-context-vs-rag` | Long context, RAG tradeoffs |
| `days/day-013-speculative-decoding` | Speculative decoding |
| `days/day-014-multi-gpu-scaling` | Multi-GPU and multi-node scaling |
| `days/day-015-multi-tenant-qos` | Multitenancy and QoS |
| `days/day-016-cost-efficiency-accounting` | Cost and capacity planning |
| `days/day-017-reliability-guardrails` | Reliability and guardrails |
| `days/day-018-alignment-e2e-demo` | RL and policy inference, evals |
| `days/day-019-state-space-or-moe` | MoE, state-space, specialized model mechanics |
| `days02/` full-stack map | Overall book structure and milestone progression |
| `topics/vllm` | vLLM implementation chapters |
| `topics/quantization` | Quantization chapter |
| `topics/tensorrt-llm` | Runtime map and kernel/compiler path |
| `topics/serving-patterns` | Production and advanced architecture chapters |

## GitHub Repo Note

The requested GitHub repository `ozgurgulerx/inference-engineering` did not
resolve through the GitHub CLI during setup. If it is private, renamed, or under
a different owner, update this appendix after adding the remote or cloning it
locally.
